title: Clear Your Throat with 8 Herbal Tinctures for Older Adults with Mucus
description: Echinacea purpurea tinctures are often used to help with mucus in the throat due to their anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The tinctures contain compounds like alkylamides, caffeic acid, and rosmarinic acid, which help reduce swelling and fight off infections. When you have a cold or flu, your body's mucus production increases to trap germs, but excess mucus can cause congestion and discomfort. Echinacea purpurea tinctures can help by reducing the thickness and amount of muc...
